## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Checklist

### Pre-Review (Author)
- [ ] `bun run validate` passes locally
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

### Code Quality
- [ ] No `any` types
- [ ] Error handling in place
- [ ] Edge cases handled
- [ ] No silent failures

### Performance
- [ ] No unnecessary re-renders
- [ ] Images optimized
- [ ] No large dependencies added

### Validation

- [ ] Linter passes (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript type checking passes (`bun run type-check`)
- [ ] Production build passes (`bun run build`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (if UI change)

### Tooling

- [ ] Full validation passes (`bun run validate`)

## Additional Notes

- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated (if significant technical change)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated (if workflow change)
- [ ] Inline code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)

### Export & Features

<!-- Only if touching export or core features -->

- [ ] PNG export tested and working
- [ ] GIF export tested and working
- [ ] Tested on desktop (download flow)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (Web Share API)
- [ ] localStorage persistence verified
